description_long: This object represents a stylized jogger in mid-stride, with elongated limbs and angular, faceted surfaces. The figure's arms are bent at the elbows, one arm swinging forward and the other back, suggesting dynamic motion. The legs are similarly positioned, with one knee raised and the other leg extended behind, capturing the essence of a running gait. The jogger appears to be wearing a fitted top and shorts, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The shoes are distinct, with a thicker sole and a contrasting color to the rest of the outfit. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of blue, black, and some lighter highlights, giving the figure a modern, abstract appearance.
description: A stylized, angular jogger in mid-stride, wearing a fitted top, shorts, and running shoes in blue and black tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's face, bent arms, and raised knee, emphasizing the forward motion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended rear leg and swinging arm, with clear visibility of the shoe's sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the trailing leg, with both arms visible in motion.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view showing the dynamic posture, with the extended leg and arm, and the angular form of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted short-sleeve top and mid-thigh shorts, both with a smooth, synthetic appearance and close fit.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a thick sole, primarily dark in color with lighter accents.
attribute_running_posture: Upright running posture with one knee raised, the opposite arm forward, and the other leg and arm extended back, suggesting a dynamic stride.
